sections.title: 1. Quality Policy Statement
sections.section_prompt: Author a Quality Policy statement (3–5 short paragraphs) signed by top management. It MUST include explicit commitments to: (a) comply with ISO 13485:2016 and applicable regulatory requirements in the listed markets, (b) maintain effectiveness of the QMS, (c) patient safety and product quality, (d) provide a framework for establishing and reviewing quality objectives. Voice: first-person plural, signed by CEO.

sections.title: 2. Communication of the Policy
sections.section_prompt: Describe how this policy is communicated to all personnel (onboarding training, posted in working areas, intranet), how understanding is verified, and how it is reviewed at each Management Review per {ref:QP-005}.

sections.title: 3. Quality Objectives — Current Period
sections.ai_rows_prompt: Produce 6–8 SMART quality objectives appropriate for a company of this stage and device type. Cover: on-time release of design outputs, CAPA closure cycle time, supplier OTIF, complaint response SLA, internal audit completion, training compliance, post-market surveillance review cadence, software defect escape rate (if software/HIMS). Each row must have a specific numeric target and named owner role.

sections.title: 4. Linkage to Processes and Tracking
sections.section_prompt: Briefly explain how each objective links to a measurable QMS process and is tracked in {ref:QF-002} and reviewed in Management Review per {ref:QP-005}.
